prompt: Execute Phase D D.1: Update progress status for completed spec oauth2-social-login. PR #143 merged to main. All 6 tasks complete.

assertions.name: updates_progress_status
assertions.description: Should update the spec progress to 'completed' or 'merged' status

assertions.name: records_pr_reference
assertions.description: Should record the PR number in progress tracking

assertions.name: marks_all_tasks_complete
assertions.description: Should mark all 6 tasks as completed in the progress record
assertions.check: output.includes('6/6') || output.includes('all tasks') || output.includes('6 tasks') || output.includes('TASK-006')
